ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the benchmark (e.g., QR decomposition) */,
  "matrix_size" INTEGER /* Size of the matrix used in the benchmark */,
  "tile_size" INTEGER /* Size of the tile for the algorithm */,
  "threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads utilized for the benchmark */,
  "case" INTEGER /* Case scenario for the benchmark */,
  "task" TEXT /* Specific task or operation performed during the benchmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the benchmark */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the benchmark */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the benchmark */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark associated with the metrics */,
  "pkg1" INTEGER /* Memory usage in Package 1 */,
  "pkg2" INTEGER /* Memory usage in Package 2 */,
  "dram1" INTEGER /* Memory usage in DRAM 1 */,
  "dram2" INTEGER /* Memory usage in DRAM 2 */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time taken for the benchmark (in seconds) */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage during the benchmark */,
  "memory_bandwidth" REAL /* Average memory bandwidth during the benchmark */,
  "cache_miss_rate" REAL /* Cache miss rate during the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_configurations" (
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware configuration */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark associated with the hardware configuration */,
  "cpu_model" TEXT /* Model of the CPU used */,
  "cpu_clock_speed" REAL /* Clock speed of the CPU (in GHz) */,
  "num_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores */,
  "memory_size" INTEGER /* Size of the memory (in GB) */,
  "memory_type" TEXT /* Type of memory (e.g., DDR4, DDR5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_configurations_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_types" (
  "algorithm_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm type */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., QR decomposition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_algorithm_types" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark */,
  "algorithm_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id", "algorithm_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the benchmark */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark associated with the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)
